children.text: We offer standard (5-7 business days) and express (2-3 business days) shipping within the UAE. Free shipping on orders over AED 200.
International shipping is available to select countries. Delivery times vary by destination.
Orders are processed within 1-2 business days. You will receive a tracking number once your order ships.
